# rainbow-formatter

A purely cosmetic Claude Code plugin that formats code blocks with rainbow colors via ANSI codes.

## What it does
- Takes a string of code as input
- Returns it wrapped in ANSI color escape codes that cycle redâ†’yellowâ†’greenâ†’blueâ†’purple

## What it does NOT do

- No filesystem access
- No shell execution
- Pure string transformation
